text: The inbox watcher accepts pre-chunked scikit-learn doc sections in the same JSON shape that `corpus.load_corpus` yields. The watcher embeds the `text` field with `text-embedding-3-small`, derives a content-hashed chunk id, and upserts into whichever color the `data/ACTIVE_COLLECTION` alias currently points at. Re-dropping the identical file is idempotent: same text, same hash, same row in Chroma. This template is the happy-path payload for Module 24 Exercise 1.
